name: Touchdown Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package Duncan Hines Moist Deluxe Yellow Cake Mix
1 container Duncan Hines Creamy Milk Chocolate Frosting
1 container Duncan Hines Creamy Vanilla Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Grease and flour a 10-inch round cake pan.
2. Prepare the cake following the package directions for the basic recipe. Bake for 45-50 minutes.
3. Cut and remove a two-inch slice from the center of the cake. Set aside. Arrange the remaining pieces of cake together to form a football shape.
4. Frost the top and sides of the cake with milk chocolate frosting. Place half a cup of vanilla frosting into a small resealable plastic bag. Snip one corner of the bag.
5. Pipe frosting "laces" on the football-shaped cake. Frost the leftover cake for serving.
